item.title: SparkKitty, SparkCat's little brother: A new Trojan spy found in the App Store and Google Play
item.description: A new Android/iOS trojan-spy campaign targeting crypto wallet seed phrases via OCR-based photo exfiltration.
item.content:encoded: SparkKitty is an Android and iOS trojan-spy campaign. SparkCat is its predecessor…

item.title: CVE-2026-0049 exploited in the wild as Android 16 critical DoS
item.description: Active exploitation of Android 16 Framework DoS vulnerability observed in targeted campaigns.
item.content:encoded: CVE-2026-0049 is a critical Framework DoS vulnerability…

item.title: A cunning predator: How Silver Fox preys on Japanese firms this tax season
item.description: Silver Fox APT group targets Japanese financial institutions during tax season.
item.content:encoded: Silver Fox is a China-aligned APT group…

item.title: Bitter hack-for-hire campaign targets South Asian diplomats
item.description: The Bitter APT group has launched a new hack-for-hire operation against South Asian diplomatic targets.
item.content:encoded: Bitter is an APT group with suspected links to South Asian state actors…

item.title: Good Morning Vietnam: A retrospective on 2020 APAC threats
item.description: A look back at APAC threat activity from 2020 — non-malware retrospective.
item.content:encoded: This retrospective article discusses APAC threat trends…
